title: Simple Lag Fix
description: Simple Lag Fix is a lightweight Minecraft plugin that optimizes server performance with auto item clearing, mob limits, and TPS monitoring.
body:
# **Simple Lag Fix**
**Lightweight performance optimization for your Minecraft server.**

## **Features**

**Auto Item Clearing**: Automatically removes old dropped items to reduce lag.
**Mob Limits**: Prevents excessive mobs per chunk for smoother gameplay.
**TPS Monitor**: Shows server TPS in a customizable BossBar for OPs.
**Player Debug Toggle**: Admins can toggle debug info per player.
**Auto-Clear Countdown*: Broadcasts countdowns in chat before clearing items.

## **Commands**

/lagfix status – View TPS, mob limits, and item clear info.

/lagfix clearitems – Manually remove dropped items.

/lagfix reload – Reload the plugin config.

/lagfix tps – Toggle TPS BossBar (OP only).

/lagfix debug – Toggle debug info (OP only).

## **Configurable**

Item clear intervals, item age, mob limits, blocked spawn reasons, and TPS display.
